title: Going off grid: A comparative study of the Lagrangian and Eulerian perspectives of new particle formation events
author: O’Donnell, Samuel E and Croft, Betty and Ford, Bonne and June, Nicole A and Kuang, Chongai and Singh, Ashish and Chang, Rachel Y-W and Collins, Don R and Hakala, Simo and Jathar, Shantanu H and others
